prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年理科最低位次约128名，2024年升至约89名（前移39名），2025年物理类约98名（后移9名）；近三年位次在89-128名之间波动，2025年基准约98名。；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2023年7人、2024年7人、2025年9人（扩招2人），2026年计划7人，较2025年缩招2人 （-22.2%），缩招幅度较大，理论上使竞争加剧、位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2026年持续位列第7名，属于C9联盟 顶尖高校，层次极高，对高分考生吸引力稳定；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生与中科大少年班渊源提升声誉）；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面 （教授因贪污助学生入读硕士被判囚事件），可能轻微抑制报考热度；抖音综合热度排名第12（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映公众关注度较高；第五轮学科评 估中，A+学科包括物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等7个；A学科包括数学、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、工商管理、管理科 学与工程等5个；A-学科7个；合计19个A-及以上学科，学科实力极强，对优质生源吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业以物理学类、电子信息类、计算机类、工科试 验班等理工科为主，与当前社会高热专业方向高度契合；宁夏2026年普通高考总人数约66000人（不确定），2025年物理类44491人+历史类21406人≈65897人，考生规模基本持平；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，属华东地区，对西北省份宁夏考生而 言属于跨省求学；该校在宁夏招生人数极少（个位数），本地无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次98名、2026年缩招22.2%（使位次前移）、声誉偏负面 （轻微抑制热度）、抖音高热（关注度高但位次已极前）、考生规模持平等因素，缩招是主导因素，但声誉负面有轻微抵消作用；预测2026年最低位次约88名，区间38-138名。

- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）
- 计算机类

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 中国科学技术大学在宁夏招生人数极少（2026年仅7人），且均为顶尖理工类专业，专业间位次差距极小（2025年各专业min_rank在73-98之间）。位次在预测区间（38-138名） 内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（如70名以内）可重点冲击物理学类、理科试验班等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest science ranking was approximately 128th, rising to about 89th in 2024 (moving forward 39 places), and in 2025, the Physics Category ranking was about 98th (moving back 9 places); over the past three years, rankings fluctuated between 89th and 128th, with a 2025 baseline of about 98th. The university's enrollment plan for science/Physics Category in Ningxia: 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 9 in 2025 (expansion of 2), and a planned 7 in 2026, a reduction of 2 compared to 2025 (-22.2%), a significant contraction theoretically intensifying competition and moving rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 7th consecutively in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the C9 League of top-tier universities, with an extremely high level and stable attraction for high-scoring students; reputation evaluation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was slightly positive (the connection between Tsung-Dao Lee and USTC's Junior Class enhanced reputation); reputation evaluation during the 2026 cycle was slightly negative (a professor was imprisoned for embezzling funds to help students enter master's programs), which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking 12th (high heat), with high short video exposure reflecting significant public attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A+ disciplines include Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering, etc., 7 in total; A disciplines include Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Business Administration, Management Science and Engineering, etc., 5 in total; A- disciplines 7; totaling 19 A- and above disciplines, with extremely strong academic strength, greatly attracting high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors are mainly Physics, Electronic Information, Computer Science, Engineering Experimental Class, etc., highly aligned with current socially hot major directions; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia general college entrance examination is about 66,000 (uncertain), with 2025 Physics Category 44,491 + History Category 21,406 ≈ 65,897, with the candidate scale basically stable; the University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, in East China, which is a cross-province study for Ningxia candidates in the northwest; the university enrolls very few students in Ningxia (single digits), with no significant local regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 98th, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 22.2% (moving rankings forward), slightly negative reputation (mildly suppressing enthusiasm), high Douyin heat (high attention but rankings already very forward), and stable candidate scale, the enrollment reduction is the dominant factor, but the negative reputation has a slight offsetting effect; the predicted 2026 lowest ranking is about 88th, with a range of 38-138.

- Computer Science

- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Science and Technology of China enrolls very few students in Ningxia (only 7 in 2026), and all are top-tier science and engineering majors, with minimal ranking differences between majors (2025 min_rank for each major between 73-98). For rankings within the predicted range (38-138), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a stretch; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 70), prioritize top majors like Physics and Science Experimental Class.
